name: Brussel Sprouts with Balsamic Vinegar
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the stems and remove any limp leaves from the Brussels sprouts.
2. Blanch the sprouts in boiling water for 5 minutes.
3. Drain and rinse under cold water to stop cooking.
4. Heat a large frying pan and add olive oil, garlic, and onion.
5. Sauté until the onion is just tender.
6. Add the blanched Brussels sprouts.
7. Cook until the Brussels sprouts are cooked to your liking.
8. Add balsamic vinegar and toss so all the sprouts are coated with vinegar.
9. Add butter, salt, and pepper to taste.
10. Toss together again.
